target.field_a: Mechanobiology (ECM mechanics, integrin, YAP/TAZ, MRTF, Piezo channels)
target.field_c: Epigenomics (enhancer regulation, H3K27ac, BRD4/Mediator, phase-separated condensates)

disjointness_context: NEWLY_OPENED — landmark paper (Cosgrove 2025, Science) published 3 months before session; field genuinely new despite PARTIALLY_EXPLORED classification

key_findings.new_strategy_heuristic: NEWLY_OPENED_PARTIALLY_EXPLORED is viable when landmark paper < 6 months old. Cosgrove 2025 defined the mechanoenhancer field; immediately adjacent mechanistic questions are genuinely unexplored.
key_findings.new_bridge_type: Multi-pathway convergence on single HAT hub — EP300 receives mechanosensory signals from Piezo1, YAP, and MRTF-A via distinct upstream routes with complementary kinetics
key_findings.hub_protein_architecture: EP300 identified by computational validation as convergence point (STRING: EP300-BRD4 0.988, EP300-CAMK2A 0.908, EP300-MRTFA 0.710). This architecture naturally produces non-redundant hypotheses exploring different hub inputs.
key_findings.anomaly_leveraged: 86.2% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections lack annotated chromatin loops (Cosgrove 2025). This anomaly directly generated H5 and H5e and frames the session's core unresolved question.
key_findings.qg_discovery_pattern: iScience 2024 (PMID 38784009) found during QG verification with hypothesis-specific search terms — missed by Literature Scout using field-level terms. Lesson: QG verification can be a supplementary literature search phase.

kill_pattern.why_zero_kills: Landmark paper (Cosgrove 2025) established the field empirically; adjacent hypotheses extend well-documented findings, reducing false premise risk. EP300 hub centrality provided a verifiable protein scaffold.

mechanistic_corrections.correction: CaMKII → HDAC4/5 nuclear export → EP300 (not direct CaMKII→EP300 phosphorylation)
IDR-deleted YAP mutant replaces verteporfin (verteporfin works via 14-3-3σ sequestration, not condensate dissolution)
Enhancer-preference claim removed; core CaRG-box occupation test retained

evolution_outcomes.key_insight: Bivalent mechanoenhancers plausible in IPF fibroblasts (retain progenitor marks) not terminal normal fibroblasts
evolution_outcomes.clinical_significance: IPF fibroblasts are the therapeutically relevant population for lung fibrosis; KDM6B inhibition (GSK-J4) could be fibrosis-specific

evolution_outcomes.key_insight: H3's condensate size threshold + H5's looping-independent mechanism = condensate radius > spatial gap → multi-enhancer hub
evolution_outcomes.anomaly_addressed: 86.2% looping-independent connections explained by condensate volume threshold (stiffness-sensitive), not cohesin extrusion (stiffness-insensitive)

new_heuristics.title: NEWLY_OPENED_PARTIALLY_EXPLORED is viable
new_heuristics.rule: When a recent (< 6 months) landmark paper defines a new subfield, treat the PARTIALLY_EXPLORED status as 'newly opened gaps' rather than 'prior saturation'. The landmark paper itself creates explorable mechanistic gaps.
new_heuristics.evidence: This session: 3/5 QG pass rate from PARTIALLY_EXPLORED (highest for this category). Previous PARTIALLY_EXPLORED session (S009): 0 PASS, 3 COND. Difference = landmark paper age.

new_heuristics.title: Hub protein discovery first, upstream diversity second
new_heuristics.rule: Use computational validation to identify a single hub protein with high STRING scores to BOTH Field A and Field C proteins. Then generate hypotheses exploring different upstream pathways to the hub. This maximizes hypothesis density while preventing redundancy.
new_heuristics.evidence: EP300: STRING 0.988 to BRD4 (Field C), 0.908 to CAMK2A (Field A bridge), 0.710 to MRTFA (Field A). Generated 5 complementary non-redundant hypotheses.

new_heuristics.title: QG verification as supplementary literature discovery
new_heuristics.rule: Quality Gate web searches with hypothesis-specific terms (protein + context + year) can surface papers missed by Literature Scout field-level searches. Budget time for discovery during QG, not just verification.
new_heuristics.evidence: iScience 2024 PMID 38784009 found during QG; missed by Literature Scout. Improved H3 confidence from 0.58 to 0.63.

new_heuristics.title: Cell-type mutation rescues context-mismatch hypotheses in evolution
new_heuristics.rule: When critique identifies cell-type mismatch (evidence from Cell X, hypothesis predicts Cell Y), do not kill — evolve by identifying the cell type where the premise IS valid, and reframe hypothesis for that context.
new_heuristics.evidence: H1→H1e: KDM6B bivalency evidence from MSCs/thyroid cancer → hypothesis reframed to IPF fibroblasts where bivalency is plausible. Converted a false premise into a testable cell-type-specific prediction.

landmark_papers: Cosgrove et al. 2025, Science — mechanoenhancers genome-wide (ATAC-seq + CRISPRi). KEY PAPER: opened the field
iScience 2024, PMID 38784009 — endogenous YAP condensates + TEAD1+BRD4 with actin tension. KEY PAPER: found during QG
Tayler et al. 2026 — ECM stiffness/stress relaxation → KDM4B/KDM6B activity. KEY PAPER: supports H1e
